ddl.value: "campaigns"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "campaigns"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "campaigns"."ends_at" >= "campaigns"."starts_at"
ddl.name: campaign_period_valid_check

ddl.value: "order_refund_items"."reason" != 'other' OR ("order_refund_items"."note" IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM("order_refund_items"."note")) > 0)
ddl.name: order_refund_items_other_reason_requires_note_check
